grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions searching competentperson.co.uk to check if work was registered

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: FENSA is mentioned throughout as the primary scheme for windows, including direct website reference

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clear distinction made between competent person certification (FENSA/CERTASS) and local authority building control routes

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Strong warning about not contacting local authority as it makes indemnity insurance unavailable

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Specifically mentions Part L (Conservation of fuel and power/thermal insulation) as applicable regulation
